name: chro-advisor
description: > People leadership for scaling companies. Covers hiring strategy, compensation design, org structure, performance management, retention, culture health, and workforce planning. Use when building hiring plans, designing comp frameworks, restructuring teams, managing performance, building career ladders, handling attrition, workforce planning, or when user mentions CHRO, HR, people strategy, talent acquisition, headcount, compensation, org design, retention, performance management, employee engag
author: borghei
summary_zh: 面向成长期公司的人力管理顾问，覆盖招聘策略、薪酬设计、组织架构、绩效与留存等场景，适合在制定招聘计划、搭建薪酬体系、调整团队结构或规划人员编制时使用。
